notes: drive/index.rs (27) + search/data_source.rs (25) = 52 entries. Per-action: translate=50, flag_panic_message=2 (Should be able to lock @ line 2307 in .expect(); Object is workflow @ line 4587 in .expect()). Terminology: Trash → 废纸篓 (aligned with prior 'Empty trash' → '清空废纸篓'); Warp Drive kept English; MCP Server → MCP 服务器 per glossary; AI Fact → AI 知识 (Warp feature, no prior translation, kept AI in English); Agent Workflows → Agent 工作流 (per glossary, Agent stays English). For {object_type}s placeholder (substitutes English words like 'notebook'/'workflow'/'rule'/'folder' from ObjectType Display), restructured to bracket placeholder with neutral Chinese context: '您的套餐中已用尽 {object_type} 类型对象的配额。' avoiding the §2 trap. 'Duplicate' → 副本 (noun form fitting menu item with copy semantics, distinguishes from 复制 verb). 'View teams to join' and 'View team to join' (singular/plural variants) collapsed to '查看可加入的团队' since Chinese has no plural marker. Search placeholders: 搜索X pattern, consistent with prior 搜索规则/搜索 MCP 服务器 translations. 'Search objects in drive' → '搜索 Drive 中的对象' (Drive as brand). 'Search blocks' → '搜索命令块' per glossary block→命令块.
